programme.title: Animal Impossible - EP 4
programme.desc: Tim Warwood and Adam Gendle risk life and limb to uncover the truth about animals in this eye-opening and entertaining series. Do cats always land on their feet? But they find more than they expected, discovering a whole host of strange and remarkable truths about the animal kingdom.

programme.title: Key Witness - EP 9 关键证人
programme.desc: Yao Kang confesses to Guo Ying that the mafia is threatening him to betray the police. He reveals he accidentally killed a frontline staff while hunting down a wanted criminal, and pushed the blame onto the criminal in fear that his future may be affected. Little did he know that it was all recorded on a car's dashcam, and the mafia uses it to coerce him for information on the police force.

programme.title: Key Witness - EP 10 关键证人
programme.desc: Mary wants Zhi Ming to invite Guo Ying and Yu Xuan home for a meal. Yu Xuan uses this opportunity to ask Zhi Ming about his background and learns that he was a homeless orphan until Mary adopted him. Although Zhi Ming lost his memory, he remembers that he was kidnapped. Yu Xuan is astonished as she recalls a boy she had frequently played with getting kidnapped when she was a child.

programme.title: Dear Neighbours - EP 15 我的左邻右里
programme.desc: Ting Xuan confesses to Wei Ren. Wei Ren is troubled, and he tells Ji Dan Zai that he is still going through his divorce and does not think that he is ready to begin a new relationship. Ji Dan Zai realises that Wei Ren does not have feelings for Jia Ying, and he gets angry because he feels anguished that Jia Ying would fall for such a man. In contrast, he tries so hard to pursue Jia Ying, but Jia Ying always avoids him instead.

programme.title: Dear Neighbours - EP 16 我的左邻右里
programme.desc: At the En Bloc Signing event, there is an air of excitement. Xiao Long and Shu Juan try to agitate the residents and influence their decision. Wei Ren is angry, and he confronts Shu Juan. Yan Xun invites the property owner to sign the document, but all of a sudden a snake appears, causing a wave of panic. Yan Xun finds out that the snake is actually a toy snake, and that Xiao Long had planned this. He becomes angered by this.

programme.title: My Fair Lady - EP 5 我爱钟无艳
programme.desc: According to the legend, during the Period of the Warring States, there was a woman gifted with immense abilities. Her name is Zhong Wu Yan. Among the many talented individuals of that era, she stands out from the crowd, due in no small part to her knowledge of warfare, weapons and magic. Her gifts bring her to the attention of Emperor Qi, who takes her as his bride in order to help him manage the kingdom.

Now they must con and fight their way across the west through thousands of cavalry, lawmen, bounty hunters, and Indians to make their escape.

programme.title: Casper the Friendly Ghost - Casper the Friendly Ghost Ep8 - EP108
programme.desc: Depressed by the antics of the other ghosts, Casper leaves home to make friends. After unintentionally scaring several potential pals, Casper befriends two young children. They take him home, where Casper frightens their mother. Casper is again upset because he believes that he will always scare away his potential buddies. However, Casper scares away a banker who is coming to foreclose on the woman's house, and this wins her heart for Casper.

programme.title: Shaq's Garage - Win Klaus Win! - EP123
programme.desc: Klaus may have finally met his match as his rival, Niccolo Tessio, beats him in an official race, but Klaus has an ace up his sleeve: magic tires.

programme.title: The Twisted Tales of Felix the Cat - The Twisted Tales of Felix the Cat Ep1 - EP101
programme.desc: The beyond surreal adventures of Felix The Cat and his friends set in an incredibly weird and fantastical toon world where everything is alive and only dream logic rules. Each episode has three segments.

programme.title: Kidaverse Roblox Rumble - Kidaverse Roblox Rumble Ep2 - EP2
programme.desc: Eight kid gamers, ages eight to twelve, battle it out in ten different Roblox games to win prizes and find out who is the ultimate gamer! Video gamer, football star, and children’s book author Rashad Jennings hosts!

programme.title: Kids' Planet - Love - EP120
programme.desc: In this episode, we will learn about the value of love. We will understand that when we have love in our hearts, we care about the well-being of others, so we make them happy. Pets must also be treated with love and respect. The first step to accepting that we are unique is by loving ourselves. Respect is a big part of love and when love is in our heart, there is no place for negative feelings.

programme.title: Kids' Planet - Differences - EP121
programme.desc: In this chapter, we will discover that culture is a way of life that is passed down from generation to generation, and through speaking of our differences we learn about other cultures. We will understand that putting ourselves in someone else's shoes means thinking about what they might be feeling, or what they might be struggling within their lives.

programme.title: Mellodees - Itsy Bitsy Spider - EP3
programme.desc: With a rainstorm approaching, Dee has playtime in his room and makes a new little friend.

programme.desc: In a new spin-off series of mini-episodes - ‘Sunny Bunnies Get Busy’ - the characters are on hand to entertain and engage viewers in various colourful and creative activities and inspire children to 'Get Busy'.

Its 7-layer design ensures even heat distribution and helps keep heat longer, providing great cooking results every time. Perfect for those looking for high-quality, easy-to-use kitchen tools. ASD爱仕达316不锈钢不粘炒锅采用三层钢结构与耐高温不粘涂层，结合了不锈钢的耐用与不粘锅的便捷。蜂窝纹理设计省油防粘，食材加热均匀，不怕铁铲和钢丝球刮擦，适合烹饪各种坚硬食材。

programme.title: The Wonder Shop (Home Shopping) - Naturalle Sugar Care Tea
programme.desc: Crafted from 100% natural leaves including gymnema, mulberry and green tea, the Naturalle Sugar Care tea is mild-flavoured and low in calories. A perfect post-meal beverage, this tea may help curb sugar cravings and support healthy post-meal blood sugar levels, making it great for individuals who frequently consume carbohydrate-rich or sugary foods. Naturalle 糖适宁茶采用 100% 天然叶材精制而成，包括匙羹藤、桑叶与绿茶，口感清淡、低热量。糖适宁茶是适合餐后饮用，有助于抑制对甜食的渴望和维持血糖健康水平，非常适合经常摄取高碳水或含糖食物的人士饮用

programme.title: The Wonder Shop (Home Shopping) - Philips Azur Steam Iron
programme.desc: The Philips Azur 8000 Series Steam Iron delivers powerful performance with OptimalTEMP technology, ensuring that no fabric will be burned. The intelligent temperature control guarantees no scorching, allowing you to iron both horizontally and vertically with ease. Philips Azur 8000系列蒸汽熨斗有OptimalTEMP免调校温控技术，保证不会把面料烫坏。智能温控保证不熨焦，让您水平、垂直熨烫一机搞定！

programme.title: The Wonder Shop (Home Shopping) - Health+ Kampo Premium Cordyceps & Bitter Melon Triple Cleanse
programme.desc: The bitter melon formula supports natural detoxification, helps balance blood sugar, and promotes healthy metabolism. The cordyceps capsules boost energy, nourish blood health, and strengthen immunity. Carefully formulated with selected herbal extracts and GMP-certified, these supplements are ideal for daily wellness and long-term natural health maintenance. Health+ 日本汉方苦瓜三清素帮你清热解毒、平衡血糖、促进代谢，Health+ 日本汉方至尊虫草胶囊补气养血、提升免疫力和精力。精选草本精华，GMP认证，天天养生也安心，长期调理体质更自然健康！

programme.title: The Wonder Shop (Home Shopping) - Furi Knife Bundle Set
programme.desc: Slice, dice, and chop like a pro with our kitchen knives! 厨房刀片如同专业大厨一般娴熟！

programme.title: The Wonder Shop (Home Shopping) - Q’SAI Knee Supporter Collagen
programme.desc: QSAI Knee Supporter Collagen, cumulative sales exceed 50 million pieces as of Jan 2024, delivers highly absorbable collagen peptides, Hyaluronic Acid, and Chondroitin to nourish joints and cartilage, relieve joint pain. Its tasteless, odorless powder blends effortlessly into any food or drink, making it perfect for daily joint care, especially for those who prefer not to take pills. Q’SAI 膝之助胶原蛋白粉 QSAI 护膝胶原蛋白粉，截至2024年1月累计销量已超过5000万盒，富含高吸收性的胶原蛋白肽、玻尿酸和软骨素，有助滋养关节和软骨、缓解关节疼痛。其无味无臭的粉末状配方，可轻松加入任何食物或饮料中服用，是日常关节护理的理想之选，尤其适合那些不想服用药片的人士。

programme.title: The Hellbenders
programme.desc: After the civil war, a hell-bent Confederate Army Officer and his sons rob a Union Caravan carrying a fortune, killing every man and beast in the process. They hide the money in an empty coffin and hire a woman to pose as a widow to a dead officer to make it look official. Now they must con and fight their way across the west through thousands of cavalry, lawmen, bounty hunters, and Indians to make their escape.

programme.title: Dirty Heroes
programme.desc: After three American soldiers escape from a German prison, they go to the resistance headquarters where they are assigned a dangerous mission of stealing the documents from the Wehrmacht.

programme.title: The Two Gladiators
programme.desc: After the death of Marcus Aurelius, an emissary is dispatched to locate his twin brother to assume the throne.

programme.title: Double Target
programme.desc: After several American and British military personnel are killed in suicide attacks throughout Southeast Asia, the U.S. begins to suspect a plot by the Vietnam government. To uncover the truth, the U.S. army calls upon a former commando who is looking for his long-lost son in Vietnam. While his military commanders want to see the commando succeed in his mission, his political overseers have a different set of plans.

programme.desc: We go first to Andorra, at the heart of the Pyrenees, where the FISE Games offers some of the best free sports in the world. Meanwhile, in Mexico, the elite of FMX show off their talents before an immense crowd.

programme.title: The Truth About - Jonah Lomu - EP17
programme.desc: Jonah Lomu changed rugby when he annihilated England in the 1995 World Cup. Another New Zealander, Peter Snell, put his country on the map more than 30 years earlier with his middle distance running.

programme.title: Chill - Mandurah Women's Wakeboarding - EP15
programme.desc: The best of women's wakeboard with the coming of the IWWF to Mandurah in Australia. The magnificent Italian island of Sicily welcomes the kitesurf world tour. And finally, incredible female surfers head for the beaches of Brazil for the Rio Pro.

programme.title: GOAT - The Greatest Of All Time - Football Club Teams - EP10
programme.desc: Which is the greatest football club team of all time?

programme.title: GOAT - The Greatest Of All Time - World Cup Team - EP11
programme.desc: Which national side has been the best World Cup team of all time?

programme.title: GOAT - The Greatest Of All Time - Goalkeepers - EP12
programme.desc: Who is the greatest goalkeeper of all time?

programme.title: GOAT - The Greatest Of All Time - Goal Scorers - EP13
programme.desc: Who is the greatest striker of all time?

programme.title: GOAT - The Greatest Of All Time - Manchester United Players - EP14
programme.desc: Who is the greatest Manchester United figure and who joins him in the greatest United team of all time?

programme.title: GOAT - The Greatest Of All Time - Barcelona - EP15
programme.desc: Who has been Barcelona's greatest personality of all time?

programme.title: GOAT - The Greatest Of All Time - Surfing - EP5
programme.desc: From the 4 metre longboards of yesteryear to the rapid shortboards of today, surfing has given birth to many legends. But who is the greatest surfer of all?

programme.title: The Inside Line - Alex Albon - EP24
programme.desc: Anglo-Thai driver Alex Albon has shown himself to be one of the most brilliant talents of F1 with spells at Toro Rosso, Red Bull Racing and now Williams.

programme.title: Only Live Once - FISE China - EP19
programme.desc: This week the best BMX riders in the world meet in Cheng Du, in China. In Austria, the biggest European youth event in mountain biking offers three days of pure action.

programme.title: The Truth About - Jesse Owens - EP19
programme.desc: At the 1936 Olympic Games, Jesse Owens delivered one of the greatest sporting performances in history. At the 1984 Los Angeles Olympics, the collision between Zola Budd and Mary Decker become the discussion point of the Games.

programme.title: Chill - Mandurah Men's Wakeboarding - EP16
programme.desc: We are on the waters of Mandurah, in Australia, for the men's finals of the IWWF Wakeboard World. Morocco is our next destination for the kitesurf world tour, and we present Harley Clifford who storms wakeboarding.

programme.title: Invincible - Tom Brady - EP46
programme.desc: Driven by Tom Brady, the New England Patriots have become the greatest Super Bowl team of the era.

programme.title: Flashpoint - Lloyd/Freeman/Montana - EP28
programme.desc: Carli Lloyd's triple in the final of the 2015 World Cup, Cathy Freeman's 400 metres gold at Sydney in 2000 and "The Catch" which gave birth to a dynasty of 49ers.

programme.title: The Truth About - Tom Brady - EP89
programme.desc: In this episode you will find out the whole truth about Tom Brady, the famous quarterback of American football. His five NFL championship titles, his numerous records but also his amazing wife, Gisele Bundchen, have made him into a legend of this sport.

programme.title: GOAT - The Greatest Of All Time - Horse Racing - EP7
programme.desc: Secretariat, Frankel, American Pharaoh and many others contest for the title of greatest racehorse of all time.

programme.title: Foul Play - Shergar - EP2
programme.desc: The mystery of Shergar, the greatest Derby winner, abducted and never found.

programme.title: The Truth About - Shergar & Eder - EP10
programme.desc: Shergar's Derby and terrible fate, plus Eder's winning goal for Portugal in the 2016 Euros.

programme.title: GOAT - The Greatest Of All Time - NBA Teams - EP6
programme.desc: Jordan's Bulls, Bill Russel's Celtics, Magic's Lakers or the Warriors at three points? Who is the best NBA team of all time?

programme.title: Shaq's Garage - The Rescue - EP125
programme.desc: The Orlanta Zoo needs help transferring some of their animals, but Gronk's carelessness causes problems.

programme.title: The Twisted Tales of Felix the Cat - The Twisted Tales of Felix the Cat Ep2 - EP102
programme.desc: The beyond surreal adventures of Felix The Cat and his friends set in an incredibly weird and fantastical toon world where everything is alive and only dream logic rules. Each episode has three segments.

programme.title: Kidaverse Roblox Rumble - Kidaverse Roblox Rumble Ep3 - EP3
programme.desc: Eight kid gamers, ages eight to twelve, battle it out in ten different Roblox games to win prizes and find out who is the ultimate gamer! Video gamer, football star, and children’s book author Rashad Jennings hosts!

programme.title: Kids' Planet - Differences - EP121
programme.desc: In this chapter, we will discover that culture is a way of life that is passed down from generation to generation, and through speaking of our differences we learn about other cultures. We will understand that putting ourselves in someone else's shoes means thinking about what they might be feeling, or what they might be struggling within their lives.

programme.title: Kids' Planet - Consideration - EP122
programme.desc: In this episode we will understand that prudence is related to common sense and caution, to think about what you are going to say and when you can say it. Discretion is to behave in a way that does not offend anyone or reveal information. If you want to be discreet, you have to act with caution! You should think first of the consequences of your actions in order to make the best decisions.

programme.title: Mellodees - London Bridge Is Falling Down - EP6
programme.desc: Playtime gets interrupted when Dee's four-legged friend, Treble knocks down his creation. No need to get upset though, Dee and Treble rebuild the bridge while smiling and laughing together. A great display of teamwork.

programme.title: Sunny Bunnies: Get Busy - Sunny Bunnies: Get Busy Ep5 - EP105
programme.desc: In a new spin-off series of mini-episodes - ‘Sunny Bunnies Get Busy’ - the characters are on hand to entertain and engage viewers in various colourful and creative activities and inspire children to 'Get Busy'.

programme.title: Giselle and the Green Team - The Case of the Bloomin Algae - EP208
programme.desc: Gisele and her Green Team fight Nick Slick from illegally running a detergent factory in Australia.

programme.title: Shaq's Garage - Shaq's Secret Birthday - EP126
programme.desc: Nothing goes right when planning for Shaq's secret birthday surprise.

programme.title: Thomas Edison's Secret Lab - Slime Time / It’s Always Sharkest - EP109
programme.desc: When JD uses Angie’s ‘oil slick dissolver’ formula for a slime fight, a wrong ingredient creates a gelatinous Blob monster that threatens to devour the city. / While visiting one of Kent’s relatives, the kids come up with a great idea for attracting more tourists to his restaurant - the only catch is that it also attracts a very big shark with very big teeth!

programme.title: Mellodees - Hickory Dickory Dock - EP12
programme.desc: Mini Dee explores the inner workings of a clock in this magical adventure.

programme.title: Casper the Friendly Ghost - Casper the Friendly Ghost Ep9 - EP109
programme.desc: Depressed by the antics of the other ghosts, Casper leaves home to make friends. After unintentionally scaring several potential pals, Casper befriends two young children. They take him home, where Casper frightens their mother. Casper is again upset because he believes that he will always scare away his potential buddies. However, Casper scares away a banker who is coming to foreclose on the woman's house, and this wins her heart for Casper.
